tasks.title: Create ClientAutocomplete.vue shared component
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user types in the autocomplete WHEN 2+ characters entered THEN clients are searched via OpenRegister API
GIVEN search results are returned WHEN user selects a client THEN the selected client object is emitted

tasks.title: Update webpack.config.js with new entry points
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN webpack config WHEN built THEN 3 new entries exist (startRequestWidget, createLeadWidget, findClientWidget)
GIVEN webpack config WHEN inspected THEN clientSearchWidget entry is removed

tasks.title: Update Application.php widget registrations
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Application.php WHEN loaded THEN ClientSearchWidget is removed
GIVEN Application.php WHEN loaded THEN StartRequestWidget, CreateLeadWidget, FindClientWidget are registered

tasks.title: Create StartRequestWidget.php
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the PHP class WHEN inspected THEN it implements IWidget
GIVEN the widget WHEN registered THEN ID is pipelinq_start_request_widget with order 14
GIVEN the widget WHEN loaded THEN it loads startRequestWidget script

tasks.title: Create StartRequestWidget.vue
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the widget form WHEN rendered THEN fields for title, client, category, priority, channel are shown
GIVEN title is empty WHEN submit clicked THEN form submission is blocked
GIVEN valid form WHEN submitted THEN request is created via API with status new
GIVEN successful creation WHEN response received THEN success message with link is shown

tasks.title: Create startRequestWidget.js entry point
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the entry point WHEN loaded THEN it registers pipelinq_start_request_widget with OCA.Dashboard

tasks.title: Create CreateLeadWidget.php
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the PHP class WHEN inspected THEN it implements IWidget
GIVEN the widget WHEN registered THEN ID is pipelinq_create_lead_widget with order 15
GIVEN the widget WHEN loaded THEN it loads createLeadWidget script

tasks.title: Create CreateLeadWidget.vue
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the widget form WHEN rendered THEN fields for title, client, pipeline, value, source are shown
GIVEN title is empty WHEN submit clicked THEN form submission is blocked
GIVEN valid form WHEN submitted THEN lead is created with first stage of selected pipeline
GIVEN the form WHEN Enter is pressed THEN quick-add mode submits the form

tasks.title: Create createLeadWidget.js entry point
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the entry point WHEN loaded THEN it registers pipelinq_create_lead_widget with OCA.Dashboard

tasks.title: Create FindClientWidget.php
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the PHP class WHEN inspected THEN it implements IWidget
GIVEN the widget WHEN registered THEN ID is pipelinq_find_client_widget with order 13
GIVEN the widget WHEN loaded THEN it loads findClientWidget script

tasks.title: Create FindClientWidget.vue
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the widget WHEN rendered THEN search input with live filtering is shown
GIVEN a client in results WHEN action buttons shown THEN view, create request, create lead, copy email are available
GIVEN new client button WHEN clicked THEN mini-form for creating a client is shown
GIVEN client results WHEN displayed THEN type icons differentiate client types

tasks.title: Create findClientWidget.js entry point
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the entry point WHEN loaded THEN it registers pipelinq_find_client_widget with OCA.Dashboard
